iit-guwahati.description: IIT Guwahati has 14 hostels on campus providing accommodation for all students. The hostels are well-maintained with modern amenities.

nit-trichy.description: NIT Trichy has 16 well-maintained hostels with excellent mess facilities and modern amenities.

iit-bombay.description: IIT Bombay has 18 hostels (halls of residence) providing world-class accommodation on the sprawling Powai campus.

iit-delhi.description: IIT Delhi provides on-campus hostel accommodation for all first-year students and most others. Well-connected to South Delhi.

nit-warangal.description: NIT Warangal has 12 hostels with good facilities including common rooms, gym and mess.

iiit-hyderabad.description: IIIT Hyderabad provides comfortable hostel accommodation with excellent amenities on its compact campus.

bits-pilani.description: BITS Pilani has 14 hostels with good amenities. The Pilani campus has a distinct old-world charm with its desert landscape.

iit-madras.description: IIT Madras provides on-campus residential accommodation for all students in well-maintained hostels.
